race.comment: BLOOD BROTHER (3) showed good improvement at his last start, his first in WA when beaten 1.4L after flying home late in the race. Drawn inside today which may see him sit a little closer in the run. Looks well placed off his latest effort here and he can go one better now. ROYAL GUARDIAN (10) stuck on well at this track last start when 1.3L away over the 1400m journey. Drawn wide now, but she's third-up and should be peaking. Faithfull hops on board now and she's expected to make her presence felt. PRINCE OF BONDI (1) comes here fresh and on the back of a nice trial at this track recently. He's raced well here previously in stronger company despite being a maiden and Gaerth knows him well. Can fire a shot on resumption. DEEPLY ROOTED (4) is likely to get back in the run but can be finishing off strongly. LUMINOUS LADY (7) won't be far away.
